ref: and replied, “If you are willing to let me bury my wife here, please ask Zohar's son Ephron
text: Wa weeni ba ayen, <<Ni daa siak ayen m gu m kpiewa, ni be wom mu a biisi ale Efron ale ka Zoyar biik la a te mu
translated: And when he came there, he said, "I have come to buy from you a burial site for Ephron the Hittite."

ref: Jacob sent for Rachel and Leah to meet him in the pasture where he kept his sheep,
text: Ate Jekob yaa tom wi Arekel ale Leya ayen ba jam talimu po juijui ate wa ta wa duŋsaŋa boro a nya la.
translated: Pastor Jacob took him to Arekel and Leya and they taught the lessons diligently, and Pastor also provided a school for the children there.

ref: since his family will become a great and powerful nation that will be a blessing to all the other nations on earth.
text: Abrayam le chim ka tɛŋ kpieŋ ale tɛŋ pagrik, ate tɛŋsa meena tɛŋka zuk a va wa nyiŋ a nya niaka.
translated: Abraham took his son to the land of sacrifice, and when he stretched out his hand to kill him, he saw the ram and took it.

ref: While Jacob was still talking with the men, his cousin Rachel came up with her father's sheep.
text: Wa le boro a biisi ale ba la, Arekel yaa ta wa kowa piisaŋa a cheŋ ba jigi, dii nyiŋla wa jam ka naapeerik.
translated: And the children ate their food, the Archangel came and gave them bread to eat and drink, they did their work on that day.

ref: I will give you as many descendants as there are stars in the sky, and I will give your descendants all of this land. They will be a blessing to every nation on earth,
text: M le basi ate fi ŋaaŋbisaŋa a piisi ase chiŋmarisaŋa ale bo wenzukku la. M le te ba tɛŋsaŋa de meena. Fi buuni nyiŋ tɛŋsa meena ale nya niaka,
translated: I have not yet seen the traveler who spoke to Chiŋmari at Wenzukku. I did not ask him about me. He did not know whether he asked me something they told him.
